The '''''Infinity''''' was a fast smuggling ship that the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] piloted to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] in order to deliver it to the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] "monastery" to change its [[transponder]] codes. According to the smuggler, it was this ship which he used to break [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Kessel Run/Legends|Kessel Run]] record. But that record was beaten again by Han Solo with the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] a few months later.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Infinity'' was also the name of a server - or "Galaxy" - in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=At the Crossroads: The Spacer's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}
